scripts.dev: npx concurrently "cd Backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:win: npx concurrently "cd Backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:unix: npx concurrently "cd Backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npm run dev -- --host"
scripts.test:backend:utils: cd Backend && npx jest tests/unit/utils/*.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend:unit && npm run test:backend:integration && npm run test:backend:security && npm run test:backend:controllers && npm run test:backend:models && npm run test:frontend:unit && npm run test:frontend:components
scripts.test:backend:services: cd Backend && npx jest tests/unit/services/*.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:backend:models: cd Backend && npx jest tests/models/*.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:backend:middleware: cd Backend && npx jest tests/*_middleware.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:backend:controllers: cd Backend && npx jest tests/controllers/*.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:backend:mailer: cd Backend && npx jest tests/mailer.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:backend:security: cd Backend && npx jest tests/security/*.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:backend:integration: cd Backend && npx jest tests/integration/**/*.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:backend:socket: cd Backend && npx jest tests/socket.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:backend:unit: cd Backend && npx jest tests/unit/**/*.test.js --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:frontend:unit: cd frontend && npx vitest run src/__tests__/unit/
scripts.test:frontend:components: cd frontend && npx vitest run src/__tests__/components/
